gist.headline: Honeycombs for your files
gist.blurb: We've spun up a new media upload service. Send us your pixels and audio, and we'll tuck them safely into our content-addressed digital honeycomb.
gist.summary: Introduces `media.pollinations.ai`, a content-addressed storage service running on Cloudflare Workers and R2 for hosting user-uploaded images, audio, and video.
gist.impact: Developers can now upload files up to 10MB directly to our infrastructure and retrieve them via SHA-256 hash, enabling persistent media support in apps.
gist.visual_concept: The concept is 'digital storage'. Visual symbols: Hexagonal honeycomb slots acting as server racks, glowing data blocks. Characters: Polly the Bee placing a glowing block into a slot, accompanied by the Monitor Robot checking a clipboard. Setting: A cozy, warm server garden.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot placing a glowing data block into a wall of lime green (#ecf874) hexagonal honeycomb storage slots. A small robot with a monitor head checks a clipboard nearby. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'STORAGE'. Nostalgic, organized, and warm.
